title: machine status halted/complete + termination promise
manager: Machines know when they're done — a status above the state (running → halted, plus a complete flag), with `.halted()`/`.complete()` predicates and a promise that resolves on termination. This answers "has this machine finished" as first-class API instead of forcing you to infer it from the current state, which matters for systems that wait on members and for hosts awaiting a machine's completion.
cs: status above state (running->halted + complete flag); `.halted()`/`.complete()`; termination promise; fsl#621-concept/#458/#1341.
